action.reasoning: Observation: test_full_episode.py crashed with NameError (env not defined) due to truncated/incomplete code after config prints; v15 heuristic still yields ~1-3 safe_steps (max<<500), low detector~10-25/ep, good avg_dist~1.85 in some evals but fails to accumulate facing time in [1,2)m. Earlier v4-v5 hit ~50-100 safe. Config: 500 accumulated steps needed with success_angle=0.2618rad (~15deg), max_steps=750. Analysis: follow mode too detector-dependent (rarely triggers), OA interferes when near human (depth sees humanoid), linear vel not matching human speed (~0.3m/s) causes drift, angular gain insufficient for persistent facing while moving. Root cause: unstable stabilization in vicinity of dynamic oracle target. Literature heuristic can reach ~0.5 follow-rate with proper tuning. Decision: rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py with clean v16 HeuristicPolicy (lower detector thresh=0.1, strong pure-rotate on |angle|>0.6, OA only if detector<0.3+min_front<1.0 with left/right bias, stable follow mode if dist<2.5 or detector>0.1 (linear=0.32 speed-match + strong -6.5*angle for facing), seek mode linear=0.9 if far, backup if <0.8m, refined depth valid>0.05+center patch, manual safe count using exact success_angle+dist, full per-epi diagnostics printed including streak/max_safe/collisions/detector%, use env.get_metrics() for social_nav_stats+nav_seek_success, make_serializable for JSON, proper with Env block and output dir creation). Update train.py to v16 with description. Run test_full_episode.py (NUM_EPISODES=5) for fast validation of improved safe_steps before submit_eval on predict.py (dummy ckpt).
